current_e1_restructure: YES-NAMING-AND-LAYERING; retain verified values, reorganize methods and add only approved P0/P1 analyses later.
formal_name: EMVA-inspired layered gated ICCD operational noise characterization

layers.content: metadata, DN integrity, zero/saturation, scene relation, candidate response range
layers.name: data and response validity

layers.content: temporal maps, difference-frame noise, convergence, split repeatability, drift, sample-lag correlation
layers.name: temporal noise and stability

layers.content: repeatable observed stable component, row/column residual energy, covariance, temporal-residual ACF/NPS, ROI sensitivity
layers.name: spatial nonuniformity and correlation

layers.content: verified exposure-response only when metadata permits; otherwise observed signal-level versus operational temporal strength
layers.name: signal/exposure dependence

layers.content: calibration-only repeatable NLF/covariance parameters with holdout separation
layers.name: restoration-model constraints

signal_conditioned_conclusion: RETAINS-OPERATIONAL-BASIS; it remains an observed-signal-conditioned strength model, not a physical gain/PTC result.
why_not_current_e1_only: E1 lacks a formal difference-frame/covariance/NPS definition registry and does not resolve exposure, scene or matching dark provenance.
why_not_standard_ptc_only: Current data lack prescribed homogeneous calibrated illumination, matched darks and a verified ICCD exposure/irradiance series.
